title: helichrysum bracteolatum
intro: Helichrysum bracteolatum, also known as the annual everlasting, is a flowering plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is native to Australia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum bracteolatum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum bracteolatum include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
